title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nature's Basket Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nature's Basket Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nature's Basket Holdings Services. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Nature's Basket Holdings Services:
Nature's Basket Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nature's Basket Holdings Services!
